signals.headline: Cavaliers Defeat Raptors 115-105 in Game 2, Secure 2-0 Lead in Eastern Conference First-Round Playoffs | YES | HIGH conf
signals.raw:
Cavaliers Defeat Raptors 115-105 in Game 2, Secure 2-0 Lead in Eastern Conference First-Round Playoffs | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Cleveland Cavaliers won Game 2 on Monday night, led by Donovan Mitchell's 30 points, James Harden's 28 points and 4 assists (moving him to 7th on playoff assists list), and Evan Mobley's 25 points, never trailing en route to a 115-105 victory over Toronto.[1][2]
